description: Contract governing the handoff of generated output payloads from the Epistemic Generation Gateway to the Write Dispatch Agent.

atom_id.description: ID of the semantic atom that produced this generated output.

source_intent_id.description: ID of the originating IDE intent, carried forward.

generated_content.description: The content string produced by EGG for dispatch.

generation_mode.description: EGG mode used to produce this output.

confidence.description: EGG confidence score for the generated output.

pam_flagged.description: True if PAM forwarded this atom with alignment_status=FLAGGED.

coherence.description: True if the Stumpy coherence invariant is satisfied.

attention.description: True if the Stumpy attention invariant is satisfied.

reversibility.description: True if the Stumpy reversibility invariant is satisfied.

silence.description: True if the Stumpy silence invariant is satisfied.

entropy.description: True if the Stumpy entropy invariant is satisfied.

invariant_check.description: Stumpy invariant audit results. All five invariants must be present.

guarantees: atom_id references a valid semantic atom that passed PAM_EGG contract with alignment_status != MISALIGNED.
source_intent_id references a valid IDE intent ID.
generation_mode is one of the defined enum values.
invariant_check contains all five Stumpy invariant keys.
pam_flagged is present and true if the originating PAM result had alignment_status=FLAGGED.
timestamp is a valid UTC ISO-8601 string.

EMPTY_CONTENT.description: generated_content is empty or whitespace only.
EMPTY_CONTENT.escalation: Log and emit EGG_ERROR event. Do not forward to WDA.

INVARIANT_FAILURE.description: One or more Stumpy invariants in invariant_check are false.
INVARIANT_FAILURE.escalation: Forward to WDA with INVARIANT_FAILED annotation listing the failing invariant keys. WDA must record failures in vault metadata.

CONFIDENCE_BELOW_MINIMUM.escalation: Forward to WDA with LOW_CONFIDENCE annotation. WDA must tag the vault record accordingly.

PAM_FLAG_NOT_PROPAGATED.description: PAM forwarded atom with FLAGGED status but pam_flagged is absent or false.
PAM_FLAG_NOT_PROPAGATED.escalation: Log and emit EGG_ERROR event. Do not forward to WDA.
